data.body: Re-verified epic elfish-chair-lug against shipped 1fa8 (main 49ad69bcd): plan accurate, no scope collisions; corrections recorded — S3 g2p paths (.template + materialize script), S2 alarm model monitoring_1fa8.tf, S6 extends two-vote-gate-rollback.md, S5 scenario 6 needs the pending Verified flip; attestation dep-drift confirmed (3 pinned files changed) -> re-review at claim. Credentials audit: Gerrit HTTPS reachable (nginx 200); keychain holds ONE identity (rebar-review-bot HTTP cred) which authenticates (ls-remote /a/rebar OK; Gerrit main == GitHub main); change 141 was pushed by Administrator (no admin cred in this keychain); no gerrit remote configured in checkout; no commit-msg hook installed; ssh 29418 known_hosts stale (host-key mismatch). Contributor-flow gaps: remote + hook + a proper non-bot contributor identity (GitHub OAuth per CONTRIBUTING); bot cred may have echoed into session transcript via credential-helper state — recommend regenerating the bot HTTP password.
